mapper.sql: SELECT id, user_id, ak, tool_session_id, title, status, im_group_id, created_at, last_active_at FROM skill_session
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM skill_session WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO skill_session (user_id, ak, tool_session_id, title, status, im_group_id, created_at, last_active_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{ak}, #{toolSessionId}, #{title}, #{status}, #{imGroupId}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE skill_session SET status = 'ACTIVE', last_active_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'IDLE'
